Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: EmeraldAI - AI-Powered SEO Blog Generator

- Set up Next.js 16 with TypeScript and App Router
- Implemented Grok (xAI) integration for article generation
- Added user authentication with NextAuth.js
- Created Prisma database schema (SQLite)
- Built article generation form with humanization levels
- Implemented dashboard for article management
- Added export functionality (Markdown/HTML)
- Configured PWA support with next-pwa
- Styled with Tailwind CSS
- Included comprehensive README and SETUP guide

Features:
- AI-powered blog generation (1200-1850 words)
- SEO optimization with keyword integration
- Three humanization levels (low, medium, enhanced)
- E-E-A-T compliance
- Article analytics and scoring
- Progressive Web App capabilities

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
